params.name: The Goodbye Kiss
params.description:
On Jul 18, 1935 AD, a photographer took the photo The Goodbye Kiss.
The Goodbye Kiss is a military-themed photo taken during World War II. At the time, soldiers were separated from their families to join the battlefield. The photo shows a soldier on the verge of departure, leaning out the window at the train station to kiss his loved one goodbye.
